text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder looks like she's on the brink of a
burnout, so I bring her to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry you had to go so far out of your way for
me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You should take some time off to rest as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Goodness me. Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer doesn't seem to be here. I wonder what's
around.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Is that a full tea set? It even includes
top-grade gyokuro tea leaves...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This place is so tranquil, I should take a moment
to relax.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The caress of the breeze... The freshness of the
air... The beautiful sky stretching endlessly
above...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now that I've calmed down, I realize how
surprisingly pleasant this place is. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It was an incredible dream. I was in this
lovely place drinking tea.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That must be why I feel so rejuvenated. If only I
could take you there, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging by her face, I'd say Grass Wonder is back
to her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Oh, dear. What happened to the tea?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was certain I was drinking a fresh brew just a
moment ago... But this is the infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So it must have all been a strange dream, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Grass Wonder's nap was less than
restful.
